lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਸਚਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਆਏ ਸਾਚੁ ਕਮਾਏ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਧਨ ਰਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: pir sachaa milai aae saach kamaae saach sabad dhan raatee |
lines.english: The True Husband Lord comes to meet the soul-bride who practices Truth, and is imbued with the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰੀ ਪਿਰੁ ਸਚੜਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aap chhodd sevaa karee pir sacharraa milai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Renouncing ego, I serve them; thus I meet my True Husband Lord, with intuitive ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰੇ ਵੇਖੁ ਹਦੂਰੇ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਾਣੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: pir rahiaa bharapoore vekh hadoore rang maane sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Her Husband Lord is fully pervading everywhere; beholding Him ever-present, she enjoys His Love, with intuitive ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਦੇ ਨ ਰਾਂਡ ਸਦਾ ਸੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਹਜ ਸਮਾਧੀ ॥
lines.translit: kade na raandd sadaa sohaagan antar sehaj samaadhee |
lines.english: She shall never become a widow; she shall always be a happy bride. Deep within herself, she dwells in the celestial bliss of Samaadhi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਆਪਣਾ ਕੰਤੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਪੂਛਉ ਸੰਤਾ ਜਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jinee aapanaa kant pachhaaniaa hau tin poochhau santaa jaae |3|
lines.english: Those who have realized their Husband Lord - I go and ask those Saints about Him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਦਾ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੈ ਅਵਗੁਣ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sadaa deaal hai avagun sabad jalaae |
lines.english: The True Guru is forever merciful; through the Word of His Shabad, demerits are burnt away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰਹੁ ਵਿਛੁੰਨੀਆ ਭੀ ਮਿਲਹ ਜੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਲਾਗਹ ਸਾਚੇ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: pirahu vichhuneea bhee milah je satigur laagah saache paae |
lines.english: The separated ones also meet with their Husband Lord, if they fall at the Feet of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਗੁਣ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਏ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਗਵਾਏ ਸਚੇ ਹੀ ਸਚਿ ਰਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: aaugun sabad jalaae doojaa bhaau gavaae sache hee sach raatee |
lines.english: Burning away her demerits through the Shabad, the soul-bride eradicates her love of duality, and remains absorbed in the True, True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਉਮੈ ਗਈ ਭਰਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: sachai sabad sadaa sukh paaeaa haumai gee bharaatee |
lines.english: Through the True Shabad, everlasting peace is obtained, and egotism and doubt are dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਨਿਰਮਾਇਲੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: pir niramaaeil sadaa sukhadaataa naanak sabad milaae |
lines.english: The Immaculate Husband Lord is forever the Giver of peace; O Nanak, through the Word of His Shabad, He is met.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰਹੁ ਵਿਛੁੰਨੀਆ ਭੀ ਮਿਲਹ ਜੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਲਾਗਹ ਸਾਚੇ ਪਾਏ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: pirahu vichhuneea bhee milah je satigur laagah saache paae |4|1|
lines.english: The separated ones also meet with their Husband Lord, if they fall at the feet of the True Guru. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿਅਹੁ ਕੰਤ ਮਹੇਲੀਹੋ ਪਿਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਹੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: suniahu kant maheleeho pir sevihu sabad veechaar |
lines.english: Listen, O brides of the Lord: serve your Beloved Husband Lord, and contemplate the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਵੈ ਕੰਤ ਸੰਮਾਲਿ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰਿ ਨਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: rovai kant samaal sadaa gun saar naa pir marai na jaae |
lines.english: She weeps, thinking of her Husband Lord, and she cherishes His virtues; her Husband Lord does not die, and does not leave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗਣਵੰਤੀ ਪਿਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਈ ਮੁਠੀ ਰੋਵੈ ਕੰਤ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: avaganavantee pir na jaanee mutthee rovai kant visaar |
lines.english: The worthless bride does not know her Husband Lord - she is deluded; forgetting her Husband Lord, she weeps and wails.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਅਪਣਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਤਾ ਕਰਮ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ਕੂੜਿ ਮੁਠੀ ਕੂੜਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jin apanaa pir nahee jaataa karam bidhaataa koorr mutthee koorriaare |
lines.english: She who does not know her Husband Lord, the Architect of karma, is deluded by falsehood - she herself is false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਸਾਚੈ ਪ੍ਰੇਮਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jaataa sabad pachhaataa saachai prem samaae |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, she knows the Lord; through the Word of His Shabad, He is realized; through True Love, she merges with Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿਅਹੁ ਕੰਤ ਮਹੇਲੀਹੋ ਪਿਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਹੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: suniahu kant maheleeho pir sevihu sabad veechaare |1|
lines.english: Listen, O brides of the Lord: serve your Beloved Husband Lord, and contemplate the Word of His Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਇਓਨੁ ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣੁ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jag aap upaaeon aavan jaan sansaaraa |
lines.english: He Himself created the whole world; the world comes and goes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਖੁਆਇਅਨੁ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu khuaaeian mar jamai vaaro vaaraa |
lines.english: The love of Maya has ruined the world; people die, to be re-born, over and over again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰਾ ਵਧਹਿ ਬਿਕਾਰਾ ਗਿਆਨ ਵਿਹੂਣੀ ਮੂਠੀ ॥
lines.translit: mar jamai vaaro vaaraa vadheh bikaaraa giaan vihoonee mootthee |
lines.english: People die to be re-born, over and over again, while their sins increase; without spiritual wisdom, they are deluded.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਓ ਰੋਵੈ ਅਵਗੁਣਿਆਰੀ ਝੂਠੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai pir na paaeo janam gavaaeo rovai avaguniaaree jhootthee |
lines.english: Without the Word of the Shabad, the Husband Lord is not found; the worthless, false bride wastes her life away, weeping and wailing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਰੋਈਐ ਰੋਵੈ ਕੰਤੁ ਵਿਸਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: pir jagajeevan kis no roeeai rovai kant visaare |
lines.english: He is my Beloved Husband Lord, the Life of the World - for whom should I weep? They alone weep, who forget their Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪਿਰੁ ਸਚਾ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸਾਚਾ ਹੈ ਨਾ ਓਹੁ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: so pir sachaa sad hee saachaa hai naa ohu marai na jaae |
lines.english: That Husband Lord is True, forever True; He does not die, and He does not leave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਇਓਨੁ ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabh jag aap upaaeon aavan jaan sansaare |2|
lines.english: He Himself created the whole world; the world comes and goes. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਲੀ ਫਿਰੈ ਧਨ ਇਆਣੀਆ ਰੰਡ ਬੈਠੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bhoolee firai dhan eaaneea randd baitthee doojai bhaae |
lines.english: The ignorant soul-bride wanders in delusion; in the love of duality, she sits like a widow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਡ ਬੈਠੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਏ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਆਵ ਘਟੈ ਤਨੁ ਛੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: randd baitthee doojai bhaae maaeaa mohi dukh paae aav ghattai tan chheejai |
lines.english: She sits like a widow, in the love of duality; through emotional attachment to Maya, she suffers in pain. She is growing old, and her body is withering away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਸੂਝੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਜਗੁ ਲੂਝੈ ਲਬਿ ਲੋਭਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jamakaal na soojhai maaeaa jag loojhai lab lobh chit laae |
lines.english: They do not see the Messenger of Death; they long for Maya, and their consciousness is attached to greed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਇਆ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਸੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗਾ ਭਾਇ ਦੂਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh aaeaa sabh kichh jaasee dukh laagaa bhaae doojai |
lines.english: Whatever has come, all that shall pass away; through the love of duality, they suffer in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਰੋਵਹਿ ਪਿਰਹਿ ਵਿਛੁੰਨੀਆ ਅੰਧੀ ਨਾ ਜਾਣੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: eik roveh pireh vichhuneea andhee naa jaanai pir naale |
lines.english: Some weep and wail, separated from their Husband Lord; the blind ones do not know that their Husband is with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪਿਰੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸਾਚਾ ਨਾ ਓਹੁ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: so pir saachaa sad hee saachaa naa ohu marai na jaae |3|
lines.english: That Husband Lord is True, forever True; He does not die, and He does not leave. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਸਾਚਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਸਮਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee saachaa pir milai antar sadaa samaale |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, they may meet with their True Husband, and cherish Him always deep within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਮਾਲੇ ਸਦਾ ਹੈ ਨਾਲੇ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਦੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: pir antar samaale sadaa hai naale manamukh jaataa doore |
lines.english: She cherishes her Husband deep within herself - He is always with her; the self-willed manmukhs think that He is far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਤਨੁ ਰੁਲੈ ਰੁਲਾਇਆ ਕਾਮਿ ਨ ਆਇਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਖਸਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਤਾ ਹਦੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu tan rulai rulaaeaa kaam na aaeaa jin khasam na jaataa hadoore |
lines.english: This body rolls in the dust, and is totally useless; it does not realize the Presence of the Lord and Master.
